zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix De Longueval於1257年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆隆瓦爾時，她的父親Aubert II de Longueval17歲，母親Anne de Beaumont28歲。她於1273年2月之前與Rasse VIII van Gavere結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1295年在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫加維享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix De Longueval于1257年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆隆瓦爾时，她的父亲Aubert II de Longueval17岁，母亲Anne de Beaumont28岁。她于1273年2月之前与Rasse VIII van Gavere结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1295年在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫加維享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix De Longueval was born in 1257, in Longueval, Somme, Picardie, France, her father, Aubert II de Longueval, was 17 and her mother, Anne de Beaumont, was 28. She married Rasse VIII van Gavere before February 1273. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1295, in Gavere, East Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix De Longueval est née en 1257, à Longueval, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Aubert II de Longueval, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Anne de Beaumont, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Rasse VIII van Gavere avant février 1273. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1295, à Gavere, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix De Longueval 1257 in Longueval, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Aubert II de Longueval 17 und ihre Mutter Anne de Beaumont 28. Sie hat vor Februar 1273 Rasse VIII van Gavere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1295 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Gavere, Ostflandern, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix De Longueval è nata il nel 1257 nel Longueval, Somme, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Aubert II de Longueval, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Anne de Beaumont, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Rasse VIII van Gavere prima del febbraio 1273. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1295, nel Gavere, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix De Longuevalが1257年にフランスピカーディソンメロングエヴァルで生まれた時，父Aubert II de Longuevalは17歳，母Anne de Beaumontは28歳であった。1273年2月以前にRasse VIII van Gavereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1295年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンガバーで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix De Longueval(이)가 1257년 프랑스 피카디 솜 론구에발에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Aubert II de Longueval(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne de Beaumont(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1273년 2월 이전 Rasse VIII van Gavere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1295년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 게이버에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Roses En Catalogne, A La Prise De Girond: Cotes, Ratae Coritanorum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix De Longueval nasceu em 1257, em Longueval, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Aubert II de Longueval, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Anne de Beaumont, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Rasse VIII van Gavere antes fevereiro de 1273. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1295, em Gavere, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix De Longueval родилась в 1257 г. в местности лонгуеваль, сомм, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Aubert II de Longueval было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne de Beaumont, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rasse VIII van Gavere перед февраль 1273 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1295 г. в местности гавир, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrix De Longueval nació en 1257, en Longueval, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Aubert II de Longueval, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Anne de Beaumont, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Rasse VIII van Gavere antes de febrero de 1273. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1295, en Gavere, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, a la edad de 38 años.
